inputs.name: additionalText
inputs.description: Defines the `additionalText`, displayed in the end of the option.

inputs.name: icon
inputs.description:
Defines the `icon` source URI.

*Note:**
SAP-icons font provides numerous built-in icons. To find all the available icons, see the
[Icon Explorer](https://sdk.openui5.org/test-resources/sap/m/demokit/iconExplorer/webapp/index.html).

inputs.name: selected
inputs.description: Defines the selected state of the component.

inputs.name: tooltip
inputs.description: Defines the tooltip of the option.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Defines the value of the `ui5-select` inside an HTML Form element when this component is selected.
For more information on HTML Form support, see the `name` property of `ui5-select`.

outputs.name: ui5Click
outputs.description:
Fired when the component is activated either with a mouse/tap or by using the Enter or Space key.

*Note:** The event will not be fired if the `disabled` property is set to `true`.
